name: resume-bullet-extraction
description: Auto-invoke after task completion to generate powerful resume bullet points from completed work.
capabilities: Generate resume bullets using action verb + accomplishment + technology + impact formula
Quantify achievements with specific metrics and business impact
Apply templates for feature implementation, performance optimization, bug fixes, and architecture decisions
Identify the most impressive aspects of completed technical work
author: DanielPodolsky
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown templates and resume writing guidance. All static findings are false positives: hash strings misidentified as C2/weak crypto, markdown backticks misidentified as shell execution, and security-related vocabulary in resume examples misidentified as cryptographic code. No code execution, file access, network calls, or external commands.
valueStatement: Software engineers struggle to translate technical work into compelling resume content. This skill transforms completed tasks into powerful, quantified resume bullet points using proven formulas.
userTitle: Generate Impactful Resume Bullets from Completed Work
limitations: Does not access or modify your actual resume files
Does not integrate with external job platforms or application systems
Does not provide career coaching beyond resume bullet writing
Cannot verify information against job descriptions automatically

useCases.title: Document Technical Impact
useCases.description: After completing a feature, instantly generate a polished resume bullet that highlights your contribution and technologies used.

useCases.title: Track Team Accomplishments
useCases.description: Systematically capture project outcomes with quantifiable metrics for performance reviews and career advancement.

useCases.title: Update Application Materials
useCases.description: Transform any completed work item into a compelling bullet point that passes ATS systems and impresses technical interviewers.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Feature
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a resume bullet for building a new feature using [technology] that [describe what it does].

promptTemplates.title: Performance Work
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a resume bullet for optimizing [component] by [method], resulting in [metric improvement].

promptTemplates.title: Bug Resolution
promptTemplates.prompt: Draft a resume bullet for resolving [problem] through [solution], preventing [impact].

promptTemplates.title: Complete Story
promptTemplates.prompt: Extract all significant resume bullets from this completed work [paste work summary], focusing on technical depth and quantifiable impact.

bestPractices: Always quantify impact with specific numbers, percentages, or scale metrics
Include specific technologies and technical context in every bullet
Start with strong action verbs that demonstrate ownership and initiative
antiPatterns: Using passive language like 'Responsible for' or 'Helped with'
Writing generic bullets without specific technologies or metrics
Including jargon that non-technical recruiters cannot understand

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: Compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Works across all conversation contexts.

faq.question: What makes a strong resume bullet?
faq.answer: Strong bullets use action verbs, specific technologies, quantifiable impact, and demonstrate ownership of outcomes.

faq.question: How do I integrate this into my workflow?
faq.answer: Auto-invoke after task completion. Paste your work summary and receive polished bullets ready for your resume.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: This is a prompt-based skill with no file access or data collection. All processing happens within your AI conversation.

faq.question: Why are my bullets coming out vague?
faq.answer: Provide more specific details about technologies used, scale achieved, and measurable outcomes from your work.

faq.question: How is this different from other resume tools?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on technical impact quantification specifically for engineers, using proven STAR methodology.
